themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 18 verses. Commentary leans on "Bede on Commentary on Ezra and Nehemiah: And up to the pool, etc. The pool, indeed, construct...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָֽעֲשׂוּיָ֔ה: that was made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Bede on Commentary on Ezra and Nehemiah: And the walls of the pool of Siloam in the garden of...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
